title: polypodium lignosum
intro: Polypodium lignosum is a type of fern, specifically a species of the Polypodium genus, which is native to the subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polypodium lignosum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and enhancing immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or capsules, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and supplements.
